TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Inoue Inosuke == Lu Junyi mitiliday "Ziyo sinpong", 2004 miheca 6 folad 27 romi'ad, p.15; "Ciolhahay Taywan"III p.95-99 Dotoc: ci Inoue Inosuke (1882-1966), Kochi ken no Dipong a tamdaw, I 1911 miheca o "Mamico'ay to mipatayay to mama", tayni i niyaro' no Yincumin i Taywan a malaising, i 1947 miheca 4 folad minokay patiko tayra i Dipong. "Mikotay kako to mama a mico'ay" sanay a sowal o naitiraay ci Inoue Inosuke a nisowalan. Mahaenay ko demak i 1906 miheca 7 folad 31 romi'ad itiya, ira ko cecay no Dipong Hetian (Kazu Takashi) rakes a kaysya pakayni i satekedan fana' to "Inoue", tayra i Ciamin niyaro' Siwlin sakowan i Kalinko, mamaanay ko pakayraan patayan no Truku finacadan. Tahira i Dipong konini a ratoh i, o wawa ci Inoue Inosuke o nano pisawad mitilid i sinkakoyin, mikihatiya to nidemakan a sa'opo Kristo kiwkay no Dipong, tona pakatengil cingra to pipatay no yincumin no Taywan to mama i, wata: ko rarom no faloco', saliyaliyaw sa pasowal nawiro? nawiro? saan, cekil sa payra kako i Taywan mico'ay kako to mama sato. Matiwa' aca, toya nitengilan toya paRatohay misa'osi to fangcalay cudad "Kaolahen ko 'ada no namo." (Matay 5:44), tangsol sa ira i pono' to nano sowal ni Yis: "Talacowa ccay aca a laliping ko 'aca no tosa a 'alic, nikawrira, ano caay ko nafaloco'an no i kakarayanay a Wama namo i, caay ka tfad i sra ko ccaccay aca nonini." (Matay 10:29), nanoya talapa'elal cingra, paratatenga o patay no mama, eca ko iraay ko nafaloco'an no Kawas hahiya. Naitiya, i tangila ira ko sawal cingraan: "Aka ka lowid no tatiihay. Ka o nga'ayay ko sapilowid to tatiihay." (Loma 12:21) nanoya masapinang to ningra ko nano sowal no fangcalay cudad: o satata'akay 'icel no 'orip i o olah, dengan o olah ko sapifalic to tamdaw, caay ko sakalalood, ano eca no sician a 'icel, oya olah. Nawhani ira ko olah, itira o tamdaw ato tamdaw mapalasawad ko sasiingtel, nanoya, mitelek cingra tayra i Taywan patengil to yincumin to olah no ratoh ni Yis. Nawhani, ira ko halaka to sakowan no Dipong a sifo itiya, misahalaka o pakayraan no yincumin pala "sintu", orasaka milalang to patenakay micomod i niyaro' no yincumin to Ratoh. Mafana' ci Inoue Inosuke to pifootan, pasayra to isingan ko pitilid ningra. I 1911 miheca 8 folad, malaheci ko kalaising ningra, tangsol sa toya mihecaan 10 folad 16 romi'ad tayra i Taywan, mahayda cingra micomod i niyaro' no yincumin matayal to malaisingay tayal. Sa'elinen ko nasowal o patosokan ningra i yincumin o papatengil to Ratoh ni Yis ko sapatado to isingan, sowal sa cingra o sanga'ayay a "Pico'ay" a pakayraan. Caay ko kasasiingtel, o pisafaloco' to maolah to mipatayay to mama a yincumin kararoman. Masamatira, mirakarak to cingra tayra i Luodong, Hualien, Taoyuan, Hsinchu, Wushe no Nantou a niyaro' no yincumin, ira ko 35 miheca ko halafin. Oya nirakatan ningra a niyaro' mapatireng ko kahiceraan, piadahan to adadaay no yincumin, pakafana'en cangra to Ratoh, pasool to faloco' nangra. Masamatira, ikor o pipangangan no yincumin ci Inoue Inosuke "O isingan a mama no yincumin i Taywan", o sarakatay patenakay i yincumin to Ratoh cingra. I 1945 miheca, paherek ko no saka 2 lalood no hekal, misetek cingra padoedo itini Taywan paRatoh to yincumin, o saka nga'ay no yincumin to kanga'ay sapiising, nifalic cingra to ngangan paka ci "Gao Tianming", pasi KMT sifo niocoran a citodongay misingsi, mahayda ito. O sakamatini no demak ningra, pahapinang to saka ciepoc no 'orip, sapipalolol to mipatayay a yincumin to mama a raraw, o sapipawacayaw i yincumin to nano olah ni Yis Kristo saki cingraan. Malimelaan, i 1947 miheca ira ko 228 a ddeemakan itiya, mapatangic cingra mapanokay tayra i Dipong.
S.PHON: == ino~uo~u~uə ino~uso~u~ukə == ɾo~u~u *o~u~unji mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj "*ijo~u sinpo~uŋ", **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, p.**; "ʦio~uɾħaħaj tajwan"iii p.**-** ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ: ʦi ino~uo~u~uə ino~uso~u~ukə (****-****), ko~uʦħi kən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, i **** miħəʦa o~u "mamiʦo~uʡaj to~u mipatajaj to~u mama", tajni i nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin i tajwan a maɾaisiŋ, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mino~ukaj patiko~u tajra i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. "miko~utaj kako~u to~u mama a miʦo~uʡaj" sanaj a so~uwaɾ o~u naitiraaj ʦi ino~uo~u~uə ino~uso~u~ukə a niso~uwaɾan. maħaənaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ itija, ira ko~u ʦəʦaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ħətian (ka*o~u~u takasħi) rakəs a kajsja pakajni i satəkəɬ~ɮan fanaʡ to~u "ino~uo~u~uə", tajra i ʦiamin nijaro~uʡ siwɾin sako~uwan i kaɾinko~u, mamaanaj ko~u pakajraan patajan no~u tro~u~uko~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan. taħira i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~unini a rato~uħ i, o~u wawa ʦi ino~uo~u~uə ino~uso~u~ukə o~u nano~u pisawaɬ~ɮ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ i sinkako~ujin, mikiħatija to~u niɬ~ɮəmakan a saʡo~upo~u kristo~u kiwkaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, to~una pakatəŋiɾ ʦiŋra to~u pipataj no~u jinʦo~u~umin no~u tajwan to~u mama i, wata: ko~u raro~um no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, saɾijaɾijaw sa paso~uwaɾ nawiro~u? nawiro~u? saan, ʦəkiɾ sa pajra kako~u i tajwan miʦo~uʡaj kako~u to~u mama sato~u. matiwaʡ aʦa, to~uja nitəŋiɾan to~uja parato~uħaj misaʡo~usi to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ "kao~uɾaħən ko~u ʡaɬ~ɮa no~u namo~u." (mataj *:**), taŋso~uɾ sa ira i po~uno~uʡ to~u nano~u so~uwaɾ ni jis: "taɾaʦo~uwa ʦʦaj aʦa a ɾaɾipiŋ ko~u ʡaʦa no~u to~usa a ʡaɾiʦ, nikawrira, ano~u ʦaaj ko~u nafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u i kakarajanaj a wama namo~u i, ʦaaj ka tfaɬ~ɮ i sra ko~u ʦʦaʦʦaj aʦa no~unini." (mataj **:**), nano~uja taɾapaʡəɾaɾ ʦiŋra, paratatəŋa o~u pataj no~u mama, əʦa ko~u iraaj ko~u nafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u kawas ħaħija. naitija, i taŋiɾa ira ko~u sawaɾ ʦiŋraan: "aka ka ɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ no~u tatiiħaj. ka o~u ŋaʡajaj ko~u sapiɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u tatiiħaj." (ɾo~uma **:**) nano~uja masapinaŋ to~u niŋra ko~u nano~u so~uwaɾ no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ: o~u satataʡakaj ʡiʦəɾ no~u ʡo~urip i o~u o~uɾaħ, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u o~uɾaħ ko~u sapifaɾiʦ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj ko~u sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, ano~u əʦa no~u siʦian a ʡiʦəɾ, o~uja o~uɾaħ. nawħani ira ko~u o~uɾaħ, itira o~u tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u tamɬ~ɮaw mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u sasiiŋtəɾ, nano~uja, mitəɾək ʦiŋra tajra i tajwan patəŋiɾ to~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u o~uɾaħ no~u rato~uħ ni jis. nawħani, ira ko~u ħaɾaka to~u sako~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a sifo~u itija, misaħaɾaka o~u pakajraan no~u jinʦo~u~umin paɾa "sinto~u~u", o~urasaka miɾaɾaŋ to~u patənakaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u rato~uħ. mafanaʡ ʦi ino~uo~u~uə ino~uso~u~ukə to~u pifo~uo~utan, pasajra to~u isiŋan ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ niŋra. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, maɾaħəʦi ko~u kaɾaisiŋ niŋra, taŋso~uɾ sa to~uja miħəʦaan ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ tajra i tajwan, maħajɬ~ɮa ʦiŋra miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin matajaɾ to~u maɾaisiŋaj tajaɾ. saʡəɾinən ko~u naso~uwaɾ o~u pato~uso~ukan niŋra i jinʦo~u~umin o~u papatəŋiɾ to~u rato~uħ ni jis ko~u sapataɬ~ɮo~u to~u isiŋan, so~uwaɾ sa ʦiŋra o~u saŋaʡajaj a "piʦo~uʡaj" a pakajraan. ʦaaj ko~u kasasiiŋtəɾ, o~u pisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u mao~uɾaħ to~u mipatajaj to~u mama a jinʦo~u~umin kararo~uman. masamatira, mirakarak to~u ʦiŋra tajra i ɾo~u~uo~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, ħo~u~uaɾiən, tao~ujo~u~uan, ħsinʦħo~u~u, wo~u~usħə no~u nanto~uo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin, ira ko~u ** miħəʦa ko~u ħaɾafin. o~uja nirakatan niŋra a nijaro~uʡ mapatirəŋ ko~u kaħiʦəraan, piaɬ~ɮaħan to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin, pakafanaʡən ʦaŋra to~u rato~uħ, paso~uo~uɾ to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ naŋra. masamatira, iko~ur o~u pipaŋaŋan no~u jinʦo~u~umin ʦi ino~uo~u~uə ino~uso~u~ukə "o~u isiŋan a mama no~u jinʦo~u~umin i tajwan", o~u sarakataj patənakaj i jinʦo~u~umin to~u rato~uħ ʦiŋra. i **** miħəʦa, paħərək ko~u no~u saka * ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ħəkaɾ, misətək ʦiŋra paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u itini tajwan parato~uħ to~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~u saka ŋaʡaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u kaŋaʡaj sapiisiŋ, nifaɾiʦ ʦiŋra to~u ŋaŋan paka ʦi "*ao~u tianmiŋ", pasi kmt sifo~u nio~uʦo~uran a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj misiŋsi, maħajɬ~ɮa ito~u. o~u sakamatini no~u ɬ~ɮəmak niŋra, paħapinaŋ to~u saka ʦiəpo~uʦ no~u ʡo~urip, sapipaɾo~uɾo~uɾ to~u mipatajaj a jinʦo~u~umin to~u mama a raraw, o~u sapipawaʦajaw i jinʦo~u~umin to~u nano~u o~uɾaħ ni jis kristo~u saki ʦiŋraan. maɾiməɾaan, i **** miħəʦa ira ko~u *** a ɬ~ɮɬ~ɮəəmakan itija, mapataŋiʦ ʦiŋra mapano~ukaj tajra i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ.
S.FORM: == Inoue Inosuke == Lu Junyi mitiliday "Ziyo sinpong", 2004 miheca 6 folad 27 romi'ad, p.15; "Ciolhahay Taywan"III p.95-99 Dotoc: ci Inoue Inosuke (1882-1966), Kochi ken no Dipong a tamdaw, I 1911 miheca o "Mamico'ay to mipatayay to mama", tayni i niyaro' no Yincumin i Taywan a malaising, i 1947 miheca 4 folad minokay patiko tayra i Dipong. "Mikotay kako to mama a mico'ay" sanay a sowal o naitiraay ci Inoue Inosuke a nisowalan. Mahaenay ko demak i 1906 miheca 7 folad 31 romi'ad itiya, ira ko cecay no Dipong Hetian (Kazu Takashi) rakes a kaysya pakayni i satekedan fana' to "Inoue", tayra i Ciamin niyaro' Siwlin sakowan i Kalinko, mamaanay ko pakayraan patayan no Truku finacadan. Tahira i Dipong konini a ratoh i, o wawa ci Inoue Inosuke o nano pisawad mitilid i sinkakoyin, mikihatiya to nidemakan a sa'opo Kristo kiwkay no Dipong, tona pakatengil cingra to pipatay no yincumin no Taywan to mama i, wata: ko rarom no faloco', saliyaliyaw sa pasowal nawiro? nawiro? saan, cekil sa payra kako i Taywan mico'ay kako to mama sato. Matiwa' aca, toya nitengilan toya paRatohay misa'osi to fangcalay cudad "Kaolahen ko 'ada no namo." (Matay 5:44), tangsol sa ira i pono' to nano sowal ni Yis: "Talacowa ccay aca a laliping ko 'aca no tosa a 'alic, nikawrira, ano caay ko nafaloco'an no i kakarayanay a Wama namo i, caay ka tfad i sra ko ccaccay aca nonini." (Matay 10:29), nanoya talapa'elal cingra, paratatenga o patay no mama, eca ko iraay ko nafaloco'an no Kawas hahiya. Naitiya, i tangila ira ko sawal cingraan: "Aka ka lowid no tatiihay. Ka o nga'ayay ko sapilowid to tatiihay." (Loma 12:21) nanoya masapinang to ningra ko nano sowal no fangcalay cudad: o satata'akay 'icel no 'orip i o olah, dengan o olah ko sapifalic to tamdaw, caay ko sakalalood, ano eca no sician a 'icel, oya olah. Nawhani ira ko olah, itira o tamdaw ato tamdaw mapalasawad ko sasiingtel, nanoya, mitelek cingra tayra i Taywan patengil to yincumin to olah no ratoh ni Yis. Nawhani, ira ko halaka to sakowan no Dipong a sifo itiya, misahalaka o pakayraan no yincumin pala "sintu", orasaka milalang to patenakay micomod i niyaro' no yincumin to Ratoh. Mafana' ci Inoue Inosuke to pifootan, pasayra to isingan ko pitilid ningra. I 1911 miheca 8 folad, malaheci ko kalaising ningra, tangsol sa toya mihecaan 10 folad 16 romi'ad tayra i Taywan, mahayda cingra micomod i niyaro' no yincumin matayal to malaisingay tayal. Sa'elinen ko nasowal o patosokan ningra i yincumin o papatengil to Ratoh ni Yis ko sapatado to isingan, sowal sa cingra o sanga'ayay a "Pico'ay" a pakayraan. Caay ko kasasiingtel, o pisafaloco' to maolah to mipatayay to mama a yincumin kararoman. Masamatira, mirakarak to cingra tayra i Luodong, Hualien, Taoyuan, Hsinchu, Wushe no Nantou a niyaro' no yincumin, ira ko 35 miheca ko halafin. Oya nirakatan ningra a niyaro' mapatireng ko kahiceraan, piadahan to adadaay no yincumin, pakafana'en cangra to Ratoh, pasool to faloco' nangra. Masamatira, ikor o pipangangan no yincumin ci Inoue Inosuke "O isingan a mama no yincumin i Taywan", o sarakatay patenakay i yincumin to Ratoh cingra. I 1945 miheca, paherek ko no saka 2 lalood no hekal, misetek cingra padoedo itini Taywan paRatoh to yincumin, o saka nga'ay no yincumin to kanga'ay sapiising, nifalic cingra to ngangan paka ci "Gao Tianming", pasi KMT sifo niocoran a citodongay misingsi, mahayda ito. O sakamatini no demak ningra, pahapinang to saka ciepoc no 'orip, sapipalolol to mipatayay a yincumin to mama a raraw, o sapipawacayaw i yincumin to nano olah ni Yis Kristo saki cingraan. Malimelaan, i 1947 miheca ira ko 228 a ddeemakan itiya, mapatangic cingra mapanokay tayra i Dipong.
S.PHON: == ino~uo~u~uə ino~uso~u~ukə == ɾo~u~u *o~u~unji mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj "*ijo~u sinpo~uŋ", **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, p.**; "ʦio~uɾħaħaj tajwan"iii p.**-** ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ: ʦi ino~uo~u~uə ino~uso~u~ukə (****-****), ko~uʦħi kən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, i **** miħəʦa o~u "mamiʦo~uʡaj to~u mipatajaj to~u mama", tajni i nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin i tajwan a maɾaisiŋ, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mino~ukaj patiko~u tajra i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. "miko~utaj kako~u to~u mama a miʦo~uʡaj" sanaj a so~uwaɾ o~u naitiraaj ʦi ino~uo~u~uə ino~uso~u~ukə a niso~uwaɾan. maħaənaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ itija, ira ko~u ʦəʦaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ħətian (ka*o~u~u takasħi) rakəs a kajsja pakajni i satəkəɬ~ɮan fanaʡ to~u "ino~uo~u~uə", tajra i ʦiamin nijaro~uʡ siwɾin sako~uwan i kaɾinko~u, mamaanaj ko~u pakajraan patajan no~u tro~u~uko~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan. taħira i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~unini a rato~uħ i, o~u wawa ʦi ino~uo~u~uə ino~uso~u~ukə o~u nano~u pisawaɬ~ɮ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ i sinkako~ujin, mikiħatija to~u niɬ~ɮəmakan a saʡo~upo~u kristo~u kiwkaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, to~una pakatəŋiɾ ʦiŋra to~u pipataj no~u jinʦo~u~umin no~u tajwan to~u mama i, wata: ko~u raro~um no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, saɾijaɾijaw sa paso~uwaɾ nawiro~u? nawiro~u? saan, ʦəkiɾ sa pajra kako~u i tajwan miʦo~uʡaj kako~u to~u mama sato~u. matiwaʡ aʦa, to~uja nitəŋiɾan to~uja parato~uħaj misaʡo~usi to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ "kao~uɾaħən ko~u ʡaɬ~ɮa no~u namo~u." (mataj *:**), taŋso~uɾ sa ira i po~uno~uʡ to~u nano~u so~uwaɾ ni jis: "taɾaʦo~uwa ʦʦaj aʦa a ɾaɾipiŋ ko~u ʡaʦa no~u to~usa a ʡaɾiʦ, nikawrira, ano~u ʦaaj ko~u nafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u i kakarajanaj a wama namo~u i, ʦaaj ka tfaɬ~ɮ i sra ko~u ʦʦaʦʦaj aʦa no~unini." (mataj **:**), nano~uja taɾapaʡəɾaɾ ʦiŋra, paratatəŋa o~u pataj no~u mama, əʦa ko~u iraaj ko~u nafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u kawas ħaħija. naitija, i taŋiɾa ira ko~u sawaɾ ʦiŋraan: "aka ka ɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ no~u tatiiħaj. ka o~u ŋaʡajaj ko~u sapiɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u tatiiħaj." (ɾo~uma **:**) nano~uja masapinaŋ to~u niŋra ko~u nano~u so~uwaɾ no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ: o~u satataʡakaj ʡiʦəɾ no~u ʡo~urip i o~u o~uɾaħ, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u o~uɾaħ ko~u sapifaɾiʦ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj ko~u sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, ano~u əʦa no~u siʦian a ʡiʦəɾ, o~uja o~uɾaħ. nawħani ira ko~u o~uɾaħ, itira o~u tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u tamɬ~ɮaw mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u sasiiŋtəɾ, nano~uja, mitəɾək ʦiŋra tajra i tajwan patəŋiɾ to~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u o~uɾaħ no~u rato~uħ ni jis. nawħani, ira ko~u ħaɾaka to~u sako~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a sifo~u itija, misaħaɾaka o~u pakajraan no~u jinʦo~u~umin paɾa "sinto~u~u", o~urasaka miɾaɾaŋ to~u patənakaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u rato~uħ. mafanaʡ ʦi ino~uo~u~uə ino~uso~u~ukə to~u pifo~uo~utan, pasajra to~u isiŋan ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ niŋra. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, maɾaħəʦi ko~u kaɾaisiŋ niŋra, taŋso~uɾ sa to~uja miħəʦaan ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ tajra i tajwan, maħajɬ~ɮa ʦiŋra miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin matajaɾ to~u maɾaisiŋaj tajaɾ. saʡəɾinən ko~u naso~uwaɾ o~u pato~uso~ukan niŋra i jinʦo~u~umin o~u papatəŋiɾ to~u rato~uħ ni jis ko~u sapataɬ~ɮo~u to~u isiŋan, so~uwaɾ sa ʦiŋra o~u saŋaʡajaj a "piʦo~uʡaj" a pakajraan. ʦaaj ko~u kasasiiŋtəɾ, o~u pisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u mao~uɾaħ to~u mipatajaj to~u mama a jinʦo~u~umin kararo~uman. masamatira, mirakarak to~u ʦiŋra tajra i ɾo~u~uo~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, ħo~u~uaɾiən, tao~ujo~u~uan, ħsinʦħo~u~u, wo~u~usħə no~u nanto~uo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin, ira ko~u ** miħəʦa ko~u ħaɾafin. o~uja nirakatan niŋra a nijaro~uʡ mapatirəŋ ko~u kaħiʦəraan, piaɬ~ɮaħan to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin, pakafanaʡən ʦaŋra to~u rato~uħ, paso~uo~uɾ to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ naŋra. masamatira, iko~ur o~u pipaŋaŋan no~u jinʦo~u~umin ʦi ino~uo~u~uə ino~uso~u~ukə "o~u isiŋan a mama no~u jinʦo~u~umin i tajwan", o~u sarakataj patənakaj i jinʦo~u~umin to~u rato~uħ ʦiŋra. i **** miħəʦa, paħərək ko~u no~u saka * ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ħəkaɾ, misətək ʦiŋra paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u itini tajwan parato~uħ to~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~u saka ŋaʡaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u kaŋaʡaj sapiisiŋ, nifaɾiʦ ʦiŋra to~u ŋaŋan paka ʦi "*ao~u tianmiŋ", pasi kmt sifo~u nio~uʦo~uran a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj misiŋsi, maħajɬ~ɮa ito~u. o~u sakamatini no~u ɬ~ɮəmak niŋra, paħapinaŋ to~u saka ʦiəpo~uʦ no~u ʡo~urip, sapipaɾo~uɾo~uɾ to~u mipatajaj a jinʦo~u~umin to~u mama a raraw, o~u sapipawaʦajaw i jinʦo~u~umin to~u nano~u o~uɾaħ ni jis kristo~u saki ʦiŋraan. maɾiməɾaan, i **** miħəʦa ira ko~u *** a ɬ~ɮɬ~ɮəəmakan itija, mapataŋiʦ ʦiŋra mapano~ukaj tajra i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ.
